name: Butte State Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, debit cards, and mobile banking through YourFI online platform with fraud protection features.
description_long:
Butte State Bank is a traditional bank operating under FDIC insurance, providing deposit products and banking services to consumers. The bank maintains an online presence at buttebank.com and offers core banking functionality through their YourFI online banking platform. Based on available website content, they appear to be a regional bank focused on standard consumer banking needs rather than specialized financial services.

The bank's service offerings include MasterCard debit/ATM cards with chip technology, online banking with bill pay capabilities, mobile banking through their "Butte Bank Anywhere" app, and real-time account monitoring through SecureAlerts. They also offer Card Valet, a fraud prevention tool allowing customers to manage debit card limits and define geographic usage zones. Additional products mentioned include gift cards and reloadable card options, plus an online education center with tutorial videos on their products and FDIC protections.

Butte State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on fraud prevention and account security features. The chip card technology at no additional cost, Card Valet controls, and customizable SecureAlerts (via text, email, or message center) suggest a focus on protecting customer accounts from unauthorized activity. Their mobile-first approach with the Butte Bank Anywhere app and 24/7 ATM access indicate accommodation for modern banking preferences.

As a traditional bank, Butte State Bank serves customers seeking basic banking services with emphasis on security and fraud protection rather than premium rewards or specialized lending products. The lack of information about loan products, credit cards with rewards, or investment services indicates this is primarily a deposit-focused institution. Customers should verify current product offerings and fees directly, as the website provides limited detail on checking/savings account features, interest rates, or minimum balance requirements.
services: YourFI online banking platform with login and enrollment
Bill pay functionality through online banking
MasterCard debit/ATM cards with chip technology
24/7 ATM access for withdrawals and deposits
Card Valet fraud prevention and debit card controls
SecureAlerts with customizable real-time notifications via text/email/message center
Butte Bank Anywhere mobile banking app for iOS/Android
Gift cards and reloadable card products
Online education center with tutorial videos
Account transfers and money movement between accounts
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
MasterCard debit cards with embedded chip technology for enhanced security at no additional cost
Card Valet tool allows customers to set transaction limits and geographic restrictions on debit cards
SecureAlerts with multiple delivery methods (text, email, online message center) for real-time account monitoring
Mobile banking app (Butte Bank Anywhere) enables account management, transfers, and bill pay from smartphones/tablets
24/7 ATM access for cash withdrawals and account access
Online education center with tutorial videos on products including identity theft prevention and FDIC coverage
cons: Website provides no information on checking/savings account fees, minimum balances, or interest rates
Limited details about loan products, credit cards, or investment services available
No information regarding customer service hours, phone support, or in-person branch locations
Online banking and Card Valet features require enrollment and may have eligibility requirements
Mobile banking app requires existing online banking customer status, limiting accessibility for new customers
best_for: Consumers seeking basic checking and savings accounts with FDIC protection
Customers prioritizing debit card fraud protection and account security features
Mobile-first banking users who want to manage accounts via smartphone app
diagnosis: Butte State Bank is best suited for consumers seeking straightforward, secure banking with emphasis on fraud protection rather than premium features or specialized lending. Primary caveat: the website lacks critical information on fees, interest rates, minimum balances, and loan products, requiring direct contact with the bank for comprehensive product details and comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
